meta.tldr: Aider 0.86.0 introduces several enhancements and bug fixes. It expands model support to include all GPT-5 models, Grok-4 via `xai/grok-4` and `openrouter/x-ai/grok-4`, and `gemini/gemini-2.5-flash-lite-preview-06-17`. The `/clear` command now provides confirmation by printing “All chat history cleared.” upon execution. The output of `/undo` has been improved to display only the first line of each commit message for better readability. The `/model` command now displays model announcements. A bug has been fixed where new settings for existing models were not correctly replacing the old ones. Analytics have been updated to support the latest PostHog SDK event-capture API. Dependencies have been bumped to include litellm==1.75.0. This release includes several new model integrations and usability improvements, making it a worthwhile upgrade. No breaking changes are introduced. Upgrade is recommended to benefit from the latest model support and bug fixes.

features.name: GPT-5 Support
features.description: Added support for all GPT-5 models.

features.name: Grok-4 Support
features.description: Added support for Grok-4 via `xai/grok-4` and `openrouter/x-ai/grok-4` model names.

commands.name: /clear
commands.description: `/clear` now prints “All chat history cleared.” so you know it worked.

commands.name: /model
commands.description: Display model announcements with no-arg `/model` command.
